jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at BikeDekho
jsonLd.description:
BikeDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BikeDekho:
BikeDekho is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho!
